sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ascentage Pharma (AAPG) director updates options and RSU holdings
feed.summary: Ascentage Pharma director Lu Simon Dazhong has filed an amended initial ownership report (Form 3/A) to correct inaccuracies in his previously reported equity holdings. The amendment clarifies his direct ownership of 41,457 Ordinary Shares, options over 17,965 Ordinary Shares, and 27,965 restricted share units, along with detailed vesting schedules for the options and RSUs. This filing does not represent new transactions but rather a correction of previously misstated or omitted information.

feed.title: Ascentage Pharma (AAPG) director corrects option and RSU grant details
feed.summary: Ascentage Pharma director Marina Bozilenko has filed an amended Form 3 to correct previously misreported details regarding her stock options and Restricted Share Units (RSUs). The amendment clarifies that her stock options cover 17,965 Ordinary Shares with an exercise price of 8.1400 per share, vesting monthly over a year starting November 26, 2025. Her RSUs, covering 27,965 Ordinary Shares, vest in four equal annual increments from November 26, 2026, to November 26, 2029, with no exercise price.

feed.title: Kurv Apple(AAPL)收益溢價策略主動型ETF-AAPY-ETF分割合併
feed.summary: This article from MoneyDJ理財網 provides details about the Kurv Apple(AAPL) Yield Premium Strategy Active ETF (AAPY). It lists various data points available for the ETF, such as real-time quotes, technical analysis, net value tables, basic information, dividend records, and merger/split details. The article is part of a financial information portal offering a wide range of ETF and investment-related data and tools.

feed.title: Sunoco LP Hits New 52-Week High at $67.82, Showcasing Strong Growth
feed.summary: Sunoco LP has reached a new 52-week high of $67.82, marking a strong performance with a 20.67% increase over the past year, outperforming the S&P 500. The company, a small-cap in the Trading & Distributors industry, has a market capitalization of $13,313 million, a P/E ratio of 35.00, and a debt-to-equity ratio of 1.59. This achievement highlights its significant upward movement from its previous 52-week low of $47.98.

feed.title: Small comforts fade and big worries grow as fuel prices surge globally
feed.summary: Across the globe, surging fuel prices are forcing individuals to cut back on small comforts and increase their financial worries. People like taxi drivers, janitors, and "jeepney" operators are struggling to make ends meet, with some considering new lines of work. Despite claims from President Trump about potential peace talks with Iran that temporarily lowered global oil prices, the impact has not yet reached consumers, as oil's journey to the pump takes time.

feed.title: Kroger agrees to $17M class action settlement over prescription drug prices
feed.summary: Kroger has agreed to a $17 million class action settlement to resolve claims that it inflated co-payments for insured prescription drug purchases. The lawsuit alleged Kroger improperly reported its "usual and customary" prices, causing customers to pay more than they should have. The settlement will provide pro rata cash payments to eligible class members who purchased prescription drugs using their insurance at Kroger between December 9, 2018, and the class notice dissemination date, pending federal judge approval.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Completes Acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc.
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has successfully completed its acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc. for $8.875 billion in cash, with potential additional earnout payments. This acquisition strengthens Thermo Fisher's position in clinical research by integrating Clario's endpoint data solutions for clinical trials. The deal is expected to be accretive to Thermo Fisher's adjusted EPS and operating margin, contributing to a strong return profile.

feed.title: Applied Optoelectronics Secures New Orders Boosting Stock
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (AAOI) stock surged by 6.62% following confirmed orders exceeding $53 million from a major cloud service for its 800G transceivers, aimed at supporting growing AI workloads. The company also secured another volume order from a hyperscale customer, with deliveries expected from Q2 to mid-Q3 2026. This positive market reaction comes despite ongoing profitability challenges, highlighting investor optimism for AAOI's strategic pivot towards AI-driven infrastructure.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Nicholas Olds Unloads $888K Of ConocoPhillips Stock
feed.summary: Nicholas Olds, Executive Vice President at ConocoPhillips, recently sold 6,994 shares of ConocoPhillips stock for a total of $888,650. This transaction was disclosed in a Form 4 filing with the SEC. ConocoPhillips' shares were up by 2.54% at $126.36 at the time of the article's publication.

feed.title: American Airlines celebrates 100 years of premium travel with centennial-themed amenity kits and pajamas
feed.summary: American Airlines is introducing limited-edition amenity kits, premium pajamas, and refreshed closed-toe slippers in April to commemorate its 100th anniversary. These items, designed to reflect three distinct eras of the airline's history—Astrojet, Silverbird, and Forward—aim to enhance the premium travel experience. The centennial efforts also include special aircraft liveries, an inflight menu, and dedicated digital content, celebrating a century of innovation and customer service.

feed.title: CEO Of Seagate Technology Hldgs Sold $10.00M In Stock
feed.summary: The CEO of Seagate Technology Holdings (NASDAQ: STX), William D Mosley, sold 24,584 shares worth over $10 million on March 23. Seagate Technology is a major hard disk drive supplier, and while its revenue growth is strong, its gross margin is low, and its debt-to-equity ratio is high compared to peers. Insider transactions, though not primary investment drivers, offer valuable insights into a company's prospects.

feed.title: Bullish Move: Sue Rataj Shows Confidence, Acquires $241K In Agilent Technologies Stock
feed.summary: Sue Rataj, a Director at Agilent Technologies, recently purchased 2,158 shares of the company's stock for $241,156, indicating bullish sentiment. The article details Agilent's financial performance, including a 6.96% revenue growth, a gross margin of 52.61%, and a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.49. It also touches on valuation metrics and the significance of insider transactions for investors.

feed.title: Eye On Growth: Dr. Scangos Adds $359K Of Agilent Technologies Stock To Portfolio
feed.summary: Dr. Scangos, a Director at Agilent Technologies (NYSE: A), recently purchased 3,215 shares of the company's stock for $359,276, as disclosed in an SEC filing on March 23. This insider transaction signals confidence in Agilent Technologies's potential. The article also provides a detailed financial overview, highlighting the company's profitability, debt management, and valuation metrics.

feed.title: Director Of Agilent Technologies Purchased $340K In Stock
feed.summary: A director at Agilent Technologies (NYSE: A), Otis W Brawley, recently purchased $340,390 worth of the company's stock, demonstrating confidence in its potential. Agilent Technologies, a leading life science and diagnostic firm, has shown strong revenue growth and healthy debt management, though its EPS is currently below the industry average. Insider transactions, like this significant buy, are often seen as a positive indicator for a stock's future performance.

feed.title: Board Member At Agilent Technologies Buys $241K of Stock
feed.summary: DOW WILSON, a Board Member at Agilent Technologies (NYSE: A), recently purchased 2,158 shares of the company's stock for $241,156. This insider transaction signals confidence in the company's growth potential. Agilent Technologies, a life science and diagnostic firm, reported positive revenue growth but faced challenges in some key profitability metrics compared to its peers.

feed.title: Keysight Introduces Hands-On Semiconductor Teaching Labs for Universities
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has launched three new semiconductor teaching lab solutions for universities to prepare students for careers in the semiconductor industry. These solutions provide hands-on experience with industry-standard tools and workflows in basic design and measurement, parametric testing, and photonic IC measurement. This initiative aims to bridge the gap between academic theory and practical industry needs, ensuring graduates are job-ready for the accelerating global semiconductor market.

feed.title: Humans are the North Star for AI-native workplaces -- Gartner
feed.summary: Gartner analysts Max Goss and Erin Pierre emphasized that human beings must remain central to AI deployments in the "year of the AI-native workplace." To successfully transition to an AI-native organization, enterprises need to focus on building trust with employees and stakeholders, establishing robust governance policies, and empowering employees through education and incentivized learning. They highlighted that effective communication of AI strategy is crucial to overcome employee fears about job displacement and ensure broad adoption.

feed.title: P0 Security Announces Technology Partnership with Zscaler to Advance Zero Trust for Private Resources
feed.summary: P0 Security has partnered with Zscaler to enhance Zero Trust access for modern production environments, addressing the authorization gap in cloud platforms, distributed infrastructure, and AI agents. The collaboration focuses on moving organizations beyond traditional privileged access models that rely on standing permissions and static credentials to a dynamic, policy-driven authorization approach called Zero Standing Privilege. This initiative aims to minimize standing privilege and strengthen security for both human and agentic identities accessing hybrid environments.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: The Hill & Valley Forum Convenes Leaders in Washington
feed.summary: The NYSE issued its daily pre-market advisory, highlighting optimistic market conditions despite minimal changes following a successful Monday session. The "Where You Work Matters" list of NYSE-listed companies was revealed, and the Hill and Valley Forum commenced in Washington, D.C., gathering government and technology leaders to discuss industry and innovation. Additionally, "Tomorrow's Titans: Pitch. Defend. Win." will be filmed at the RSAC Conference, while Banco Macro celebrated its 20th anniversary of listing and Dana Incorporated hosted its Capital Markets Day.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $305,000 in Buffered Digital Notes linked to the S&P 500® Index, maturing on March 22, 2029. These notes are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. and are designed for investors seeking a fixed return of 28.90% if the S&P 500® Index meets or exceeds its Strike Value, though investors risk losing up to 85% of their principal.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Surpasses $1 Million to Expand Hands-on Learning for Future Agriculture Leaders
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company's 11th annual Grants for Growing fundraiser successfully raised over $1 million, thanks to customer contributions. These funds will provide FFA members nationwide with practical learning experiences in agriculture and skilled trades, reinforcing Tractor Supply's long-standing partnership with the FFA, which has spanned 40 years. The initiative supports various projects such as greenhouse construction and electrical circuit training, preparing students for in-demand careers.

feed.title: Medtronic to distribute Merit Medical’s low back pain treatment
feed.summary: Medtronic has entered into a distribution agreement with Merit Medical for its ViaVerte basivertebral nerve ablation system, which treats chronic vertebrogenic lower back pain. Medtronic plans to make the minimally invasive system available this year, enhancing its existing portfolio of pain treatment options. This partnership builds on previous collaborations between the two companies.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. stock faces pressure amid insider trades and buyback focus as markets
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV) stock saw a slight dip despite strong Q4 earnings, reflecting mixed institutional activity including a congressional buy and fund sales. The company authorized a $5 billion share repurchase program and declared a steady dividend, signaling robust free cash flow and commitment to shareholders. Investors are watching the insurer's sustained profitability in property-casualty lines and its defensive positioning amid market volatility.

feed.title: Levelpath Named a Representative Vendor in 2026 Gartner® Market Guide for Sourcing Applications
feed.summary: Levelpath, an AI-native procurement platform, has been recognized as a Representative Vendor in the 2026 Gartner® Market Guide for Sourcing Applications. The company believes this acknowledgment highlights the growing importance of AI in sourcing as organizations increasingly adopt agentic workflows to enhance procurement efficiency. Levelpath's platform uses AI agents to automate various steps of the procurement lifecycle, from intake requests to invoice processing, helping teams achieve significant savings and faster cycle times.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $1,250,000 in Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to the performance of the SPDR® Gold Trust and the iShares® Silver Trust, with the payments fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These structured investments offer contingent interest payments if certain conditions related to the underlying funds are met, and have an automatic call feature. Investors face risks including potential loss of principal, credit risks of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co., and volatility of the underlying gold and silver trusts.

feed.title: Two Vice Presidents Named at HII's Newport News Shipbuilding
feed.summary: HII announced the promotion of Christie Miller to Vice President of Communications and the appointment of Christian Ortego as Vice President and NNS Chief Counsel at its Newport News Shipbuilding division. Miller, with a long history at HII, will manage internal and external communications, while Ortego, joining from HII's Mission Technologies, will provide legal counsel to senior management. Both will assume their new roles on April 1, following the retirements of Jennifer Dunn and departure of Jon Arena.

feed.title: UBS Group Cuts Alvotech (NASDAQ:ALVO) Price Target to $6.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has reduced its price target for Alvotech (NASDAQ:ALVO) from $10.00 to $6.00 but maintained a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 95.12%. Despite missing EPS estimates in the most recent quarter, Alvotech exceeded revenue forecasts, and the stock currently has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with a target price of $7.60. Shares are trading near their 52-week low, with institutional involvement including new stakes and increased holdings.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies (A) to Acquire Biocare Medical for $950M
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) announced its definitive agreement to acquire Biocare Medical for $950 million in an all-cash deal, aiming to strengthen its position in cancer diagnostics and clinical research. Biocare's high-growth portfolio of immunohistochemistry antibodies and reagents is expected to be immediately accretive to Agilent's revenue and margins. Additionally, Agilent launched Agilent Advanced Therapeutics, a unified Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) for oligonucleotides and APIs.

feed.title: TD Cowen Upgrades IQVIA (IQV) to Buy and Raises Price Target to $213
feed.summary: TD Cowen has upgraded IQVIA Holdings Inc. (IQV) to Buy from Hold and increased its price target to $213, citing an attractive risk-reward opportunity after a 24% share price decline. Analysts believe IQVIA will remain resilient against AI-driven revenue headwinds, expecting savings from AI to be reinvested into research. This upgrade follows a similar move by Barclays, which also upgraded IQV to Overweight with a $210 price target.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Partners With AIM ImmunoTech on Phase 3 Cancer Trial
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) has partnered with AIM ImmunoTech through its PPD clinical research business to design a pivotal Phase 3 clinical trial for Ampligen, a drug intended to treat late-stage pancreatic cancer. This collaboration, announced on March 2, 2026, will leverage Phase 2 results from the DURIPANC trial. Additionally, on March 11, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump highlighted Thermo Fisher Scientific's $2 billion investment in U.S. manufacturing.

feed.title: MDH Partners Closes $946.8 Million Cash-Out Refinance with Wells Fargo and ACORE Capital
feed.summary: MDH Partners has secured a $946.8 million cash-out refinance for its Project Interstellar, involving 59 industrial assets across 15 states totaling nearly 13.5 million square feet. Wells Fargo provided $786.8 million, while ACORE Capital contributed $160 million. This complex refinancing restructured nine existing portfolio loans into seven new ones, extending maturities and improving loan terms for the MDH Fund II portfolio.

feed.title: WeRide's annual revenue hits new high in 2025 as Robotaxi business surges globally
feed.summary: Autonomous driving firm WeRide reported record-high total revenue of 690 million yuan in 2025, a 90% increase year-on-year, driven primarily by its surging Robotaxi business. The company plans to significantly expand its global Robotaxi fleet to 2,600 units by the end of 2026 and tens of thousands by 2030, aiming for a dominant position in autonomous mobility services worldwide. WeRide also improved its financial profile with a gross margin of 30% and significantly narrowed net losses.

feed.title: Corning Unveils AI Optical Innovations at OFC 2026
feed.summary: Corning is set to introduce AI-focused optical innovations, including multicore fiber and ultra-dense micro cables, at OFC 2026, aiming to enhance density and reduce costs for AI data centers. This news has led to a 4.01% rise in Corning's stock, with analysts like Citi and UBS increasing their price targets, despite some strategic upgrades potentially influencing long-term expectations conservatively. The company also announced the debut of Gorilla Glass Ceramic 3 on Motorola's next-gen phone, further strengthening its market position.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (AMJB) prices callable zero‑coupon notes, 5.10% yield
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has priced callable zero-coupon notes with a principal amount of $1,000, an original issue price of $608.097, and a yield to maturity of 5.10%. These notes mature on March 24, 2036, and do not pay periodic interest, but are callable annually by JPMorgan from 2028 through 2035 at an accreted principal amount. The offering details, including risks and tax considerations, are outlined in the pricing supplement, emphasizing that the notes are unsecured obligations and subject to the credit risk of JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Customers Can Get Help with Seasonal Energy Bills
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Electric Company (FE PA) is offering several bill assistance programs to help customers manage higher energy costs due to increased heating system usage during winter. These programs include the Pennsylvania Customer Assistance Program (PCAP), Low-Income Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP), WARM – Low-Income Usage Reduction Program (LIURP), and the Dollar Energy Fund. The company encourages eligible customers to explore these options to lower their bills or prevent disconnection.

feed.title: Higher winter power bills? FirstEnergy lists 4 aid options in Pennsylvania
feed.summary: FirstEnergy is offering Pennsylvania customers four bill-assistance programs to help manage higher seasonal heating costs, including the Pennsylvania Customer Assistance Program (PCAP), Low-Income Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) which applications close on April 10, WARM (Low-Income Usage Reduction Program), and the Dollar Energy Fund. These programs aim to help eligible homeowners and renters with income-based payments, past-due balance elimination, heating bill assistance, home energy audits and improvements, and emergency aid to maintain or restore service. FirstEnergy President John Hawkins encourages customers facing difficulty paying their electric bills to reach out for support and guidance.

feed.title: John Deere, Garmin, and Philips may have undermined military right to repair
feed.summary: Lobbying reports show that companies like John Deere, Garmin, and Philips spent nearly $2 million influencing the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), which ultimately saw military right-to-repair provisions removed. These provisions would have granted the military access to information needed for equipment repairs. Senator Elizabeth Warren has vowed to continue pushing for military right-to-repair legislation, as the current NDAA only mandates a "digital system" for tracking data already under contract, not expanding repair access.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group (NYSE:WEC) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Barclays Analyst Says
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for WEC Energy Group (NYSE:WEC) to $111, although it maintained an "equal weight" rating, implying a slight downside from its current price. Despite this, the stock holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts with an average target price of $120.73. WEC recently surpassed quarterly EPS estimates and provided strong FY2026 guidance, while insider activity shows some selling by directors and VPs.

feed.title: Barclays Raises Abivax (NASDAQ:ABVX) Price Target to $148.00
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Abivax (NASDAQ:ABVX) to $148.00 from $142.00, reiterating an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 28.5% from the current share price. Abivax shares recently traded at $115.18, and the company beat Q1 EPS estimates, reporting ($1.24) against an estimated ($2.24).

feed.title: Barclays Has Lowered Expectations for Alvotech (NASDAQ:ALVO) Stock Price
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Alvotech (NASDAQ:ALVO) from $5.00 to $4.00, maintaining an "underweight" rating, despite an implied 28.95% upside from the current stock price. Alvotech's stock was recently trading down by 6.8% at $3.10 after missing quarterly EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations. The company currently holds an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $8.40.

feed.title: Barclays Lowers XPENG (NYSE:XPEV) Price Target to $16.00
feed.summary: Barclays has reduced its price target for XPENG (NYSE:XPEV) from $17.00 to $16.00, maintaining an "underweight" rating due to the company's unprofitability and forecasted negative EPS. Despite this, XPENG recently exceeded quarterly revenue and EPS estimates. Analyst sentiment on the stock is mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target significantly higher than Barclays'.

feed.title: Market Chatter: Uber Expanding New York City Office
feed.summary: Uber is reportedly expanding its office space in New York City. This move suggests potential growth or increased operational needs for the company in the region.

feed.title: Ahold Delhaize USA CEO to Lead Dollar General
feed.summary: JJ Fleeman, current CEO of Ahold Delhaize USA, has been appointed to succeed Todd Vasos as CEO of Dollar General, effective January 1, 2027. Vasos will continue as CEO until then and serve as a senior advisor through April 2, 2027, maintaining his board membership. The transition highlights Vasos's significant contributions to Dollar General's growth and strategic advancements, while Fleeman brings extensive grocery retail experience to his new role.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. Stock: Shares Slide More Than 1.5% in Early Trading as Tech Sector Faces Geopolitical Pressure
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. shares dropped over 1.5% in early trading, influenced by the U.S.-Iran conflict and elevated energy costs impacting AI infrastructure spending. Investors are balancing the company's strong AI-driven growth and positive Q4 results against concerns stemming from geopolitical tensions, high capital expenditures for AI, and a "higher-for-longer" interest rate environment. Despite analyst confidence and expanding AI offerings, the stock's sensitivity to energy prices and market caution underscore the uncertainties facing the tech giant.

feed.title: Ohio customers facing shutoffs can maintain service for $175
feed.summary: FirstEnergy (NYSE: FE) is encouraging its Ohio customers, served by Ohio Edison, The Illuminating Company, and Toledo Edison, to apply for various bill assistance programs ahead of the April 15 deadline. These programs include PIPP Plus, HEAP, and a special reconnect option allowing residential customers facing disconnection to maintain service for a $175 payment. The company aims to help customers manage rising energy costs during the winter season.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Notes “Sempra Is Mainly a Utility and They Want to Be More of a Pure Play.”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted Sempra in his "Mad Money" recap, discussing its role in the U.S. liquified natural gas (LNG) market. He spoke with Sempra CEO Jeff Martin about the potential for the U.S. to become a more significant LNG supplier in the wake of Middle East conflicts. Sempra operates energy infrastructure and provides natural gas and electric services.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences to acquire Ouro Medicines, expanding autoimmune therapy portfolio
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences announced its acquisition of Ouro Medicines for $1.675 billion upfront, plus up to $500 million in milestone payments, to expand its autoimmune therapy portfolio. The acquisition includes OM336 (gamgertamig), a clinical-stage T cell engager therapy for autoimmune diseases, which has received Fast Track and Orphan Drug Designation from the FDA. Registrational studies for OM336 are expected to commence in 2027, with potential research and development collaboration with Galapagos covering costs until then.

feed.title: Super Micro Stock Drops. Why Citi Just Slashed Its Price Target.
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer stock declined after one of its co-founders was indicted for alleged export-control violations. Citi consequently lowered its price target for the server maker. The stock has seen a significant drop of nearly 50% over the past year.

feed.title: Peachtree Group Acquires 600,000 SF Distribution Center Near Savannah Leased to Hasbro, Launches DST
feed.summary: Peachtree Group has acquired a new 600,000-square-foot distribution center in Midway, Georgia, fully leased to Hasbro Inc. This facility represents 25 percent of Hasbro's U.S. distribution footprint and serves both brick-and-mortar and direct-to-consumer operations. As part of the acquisition, Peachtree Group launched a Delaware Statutory Trust (DST) named PG Savannah Industrial DST, enabling investors to acquire fractional interests in the property.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Completes Acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc.
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has announced the completion of its $8.875 billion acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc., a leading provider of endpoint data solutions for clinical trials. This acquisition strengthens Thermo Fisher's position in serving pharma and biotech customers by enhancing its clinical research offerings and is expected to contribute $0.45 of adjusted EPS in the first year after close. The deal also includes potential earn-out payments of up to $400 million, based on Clario's performance in 2026 and 2027.
